summary: ANDROID 🟥 FMD | When onboarding and 'Dont allow' for location selected then in FMD in main settings dialog keep showing
scenario: Repeated FMD location collection dialog when onboarding with location access denied
description_clean: When onboarding with 'Don't allow' for location access selected, the FMD (Find My Device) location collection dialog keeps popping up repeatedly in the main settings. After enabling location in Android settings and returning to FMD, the alert play button works correctly. The bug appears to reproduce only once initially and then no longer occurs.
steps: 2. When prompted for location access, select 'Don't allow'.
3. Observe the FMD (Find My Device) location collection dialog in the main settings.
4. Note that the dialog keeps popping up repeatedly.
5. Go to Android settings and enable location.
expected: The FMD location collection dialog should appear only once or not repeatedly during onboarding. After enabling location and returning to FMD, the alert play button should work correctly.
actual: The FMD location collection dialog keeps popping up repeatedly in the main settings when 'Don't allow' is selected during onboarding. After enabling location and returning to FMD, the alert play button works correctly. The bug reproduces only once initially and then no longer occurs.
